title: Macropharynx meyeri
taxonomy: Macropharynx meyeri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is native to South America, specifically in the countries of Argentina and Bolivia. Further classification places Macropharynx meyeri within the genus Macropharynx, which belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is also known to be part of the order Gentianales. Macropharynx meyeri is considered an endemic species, meaning it is found only in its native region.
